summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FEC Canvas Zone Drag & Resize functionality (iteration 14). All features working correctly: zones are absolutely positioned on canvas, drag repositions zones within canvas boundaries, resize handle at bottom-right changes zone dimensions and updates area_m2, selection shows ring/delete button/resize handle, clicking canvas background deselects, delete removes zone, sidebar m² input updates canvas zone size, toolbar shows selection message and area counts.
passed_tests: FEC Canvas: Zones are absolutely positioned on canvas (not flex-wrapped)
FEC Canvas: Canvas dimensions scale with total_area_m2
FEC Drag: Clicking and holding a zone enables dragging to new position
FEC Drag: Zone position changes after drag (tested: x=648 to x=848)
FEC Drag: Zone stays within canvas boundaries during drag
FEC Resize: Bottom-right resize handle appears on selected zone
FEC Resize: Dragging resize handle changes zone width/height
FEC Resize: Resize updates area_m2 (tested: 50m² to 143m²)
FEC Resize: Sidebar m² input syncs with resized zone
FEC Resize: Toolbar area counts update after resize
FEC Select: Clicking a zone selects it (shows purple ring)
FEC Select: Selected zone shows delete button (red X)
FEC Select: Selected zone shows resize handle
FEC Select: Clicking canvas background deselects zone
FEC Select: Delete button hidden after deselection
FEC Delete: Red X button on selected zone removes it from canvas
FEC Delete: Zone count decreases after deletion (3 to 2)
FEC Delete: Toolbar area counts update after deletion
FEC Sidebar: Changing m² in sidebar input updates zone size on canvas
FEC Sidebar: Zone item clickable to select corresponding canvas zone
FEC Sidebar: Zone item highlights when corresponding canvas zone is selected
FEC Toolbar: Shows 'Zone geselecteerd — versleep of resize' when zone selected
FEC Toolbar: Shows 'Zones: Xm²' count that updates with zone changes
FEC Toolbar: Shows 'Vrij: Ym²' count that updates with zone changes
Full flow: Add 3 zones -> drag one -> resize one -> delete one -> verify counts update
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - zones created dynamically via UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 tested FEC Canvas Zone Drag & Resize functionality. Key implementation details: 1) Zones have x/y/w/h pixel properties and are absolutely positioned on canvas. 2) Drag uses mousedown/mousemove/mouseup with offset calculation. 3) Resize handle at bottom-right corner, visible when zone selected. 4) area_m2 recalculated from pixel dimensions using PX_PER_M2 = (CANVAS_W * CANVAS_H) / total_area_m2. 5) Minimum zone size: 60px wide, 40px tall. 6) Selected zones show purple ring, delete button (top-right), and resize handle. 7) Canvas click deselects zone. 8) Sidebar m² input bidirectionally syncs with canvas zone size. 9) Toolbar shows selection message and area counts. 10) All data-testid attributes present: fec-canvas, fec-canvas-zone-{id}, fec-resize-{id}, fec-delete-zone-{id}, zone-item-{id}, zone-bar.
